the total cost of the brushes is 20 dollars. the canvas is three times more expensive than the brushes, so the canvas costs 20 * 3 = 60 dollars. the paint costs 8 dollars per liter and she needs at least 5 liters, so the paint costs 8 * 5 = 40 dollars. the total cost of the tools is 20 + 60 + 40 = 120 dollars. the painting is sold for 200 dollars, so she will earn 200 - 120 = 80 dollars. the answer is 80.
